description_long: This sculpture is a high-relief stone carving depicting three human figures in dynamic poses, emerging from a roughly hewn rectangular block. The central figure stands upright, holding an object above their head, while another figure to the left is kneeling and appears to be supporting or interacting with the central figure. A third figure stands to the right, partially turned and holding an elongated object, possibly a tool or weapon. The background is left rough and unfinished, contrasting with the more detailed and smooth surfaces of the figures. The base of the sculpture is flat and slightly textured, with a small protruding section on one side. The overall appearance suggests a commemorative or historical theme, with a focus on human effort or struggle.
description: A high-relief stone sculpture featuring three human figures in dynamic poses, emerging from a rough rectangular block. The figures are detailed and expressive, set against a textured, unfinished background.
description_view_0: The front view shows all three figures clearly, with the central figure standing and holding an object overhead, flanked by a kneeling figure and another standing figure holding a tool.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the depth of the relief, showing the figures projecting from the block and the rough, unfinished stone at the back.
description_view_2: The rear view shows the figures in reverse, with less detail visible and the rough stone background dominating the scene.
description_view_3: The right side view highlights the thickness of the sculpture and the protruding elements, with the figures' profiles barely visible.
attribute_subject_matter: three human figures in a dynamic, commemorative scene
attribute_location_context: No specific setting is visible; the sculpture appears isolated without environmental context.
